subject: Cannot access dashboard after login
description: After successfully logging in, the dashboard page shows a blank screen. This is preventing me from viewing my data. Browser console shows JavaScript errors.

subject: Duplicate charge from previous month
description: I noticed I was charged twice in March. Checked my payment history and both transactions went through. Please issue a refund for the duplicate charge.

subject: Request: Add API for batch operations
description: Would like to request an API endpoint that allows batch create/update/delete operations. Currently, we have to make individual requests for each operation.

subject: Mobile app crashes when scrolling large lists
description: When scrolling through lists with more than 500 items, the mobile app becomes unresponsive and eventually crashes. Happens on both iOS and Android.

subject: Cannot verify account with 2FA code
description: The 2FA SMS arrives but when I enter the code, it says 'Invalid code'. I've tried multiple times and the issue persists.

subject: Performance improvement: Lazy loading for large datasets
description: Loading pages with large datasets takes too long. Implementing lazy loading or pagination would significantly improve the user experience.

subject: Database query taking too long
description: Queries that previously took 100ms are now taking 2-3 seconds. This is impacting application responsiveness. Need immediate investigation.

subject: Wrong currency shown in billing
description: My billing page shows prices in USD but my account is set to EUR. All transactions should be in EUR according to my preferences.

subject: Session expires too quickly
description: User sessions expire after only 15 minutes of inactivity. Would be helpful to extend this to 30 or 60 minutes.

subject: Cannot upload files larger than 5MB
description: When trying to upload files larger than 5MB, the upload fails silently with no error message. Need to increase file size limit.

subject: Incorrect tax calculation on invoices
description: Tax amounts on invoices appear to be calculated incorrectly. For a $1000 purchase, tax shows as $50 but should be $80 (8% rate).

subject: Feature: Export to QuickBooks format
description: Would like the ability to export financial data in QuickBooks format for our accountant to import directly.

subject: Password requirements unclear
description: Password validation error messages don't clearly explain what requirements aren't met. Just says 'Password is invalid'.

subject: Can't modify billing profile after upgrade
description: After upgrading to premium plan, the billing profile section became read-only. Need to update payment method but can't access the edit form.

subject: API documentation out of sync with implementation
description: The API response format documented differs from what the actual API returns. Example shows 'status' field but API returns 'ticket_status'.

subject: Two-factor authentication SMS delays
description: SMS codes for 2FA often arrive 2-3 minutes late, sometimes after the code has already expired. Please investigate SMS delivery delays.

subject: Missing data in exported reports
description: When exporting reports to CSV, some fields appear empty even though the data is visible in the web interface. Data loss occurring during export.

subject: Feature: Scheduled reports via email
description: Would like the ability to schedule automatic report generation and email delivery at specified intervals (daily, weekly, monthly).

subject: Cannot login with third-party SSO provider
description: Single sign-on with our corporate identity provider stopped working after your recent platform update. OAuth integration appears broken.

subject: Support for additional payment methods
description: Currently only accept credit cards and PayPal. Our international customers would appreciate support for local payment methods like Alipay, WeChat Pay.
